root.rep_text: หนังสือยืนยันยอด
root.sql:
select sum(tab.row_memno)over(order by tab.member_group_no , tab.membership_no ) as rowno, tab.* from ( SELECT decode(lag(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no,1,null)over( order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no ) ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ,0,1 ) as row_memno , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_fullname as member_name , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance as share_stock , (select month_name_thai from sc_cnt_m_month where month_no = extract(month from sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date)) as confirm_month_thai , extract(year from sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date)+543 as confirm_year , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date
, (select nvl(sum(data_balance),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'LON' and data_balance > '0' ) as sum_all_loan
, (select nvl(count(distinct membership_no),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'LON' and data_balance > '0' ) as count_all_loan
, (select nvl(sum(data_balance),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '00' and data_balance > '0' ) as sum_dep_00
, (select nvl(count(data_refno),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '00' and data_balance > '0' ) as count_dep_00
, (select nvl(sum(data_balance),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '12' and data_balance > '0' ) as sum_dep_12
, (select nvl(count(data_refno),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '12' and data_balance > '0' ) as count_dep_12
, (select nvl(sum(data_balance),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '40' and data_balance > '0' ) as sum_dep_40
, (select nvl(count(data_refno),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '40' and data_balance > '0' ) as count_dep_40
, (select nvl(sum(data_balance),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '50' and data_balance > '0' ) as sum_dep_50
, (select nvl(count(data_refno),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '50' and data_balance > '0' ) as count_dep_50
, (select nvl(sum(data_balance),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '60' and data_balance > '0' ) as sum_dep_60
, (select nvl(count(data_refno),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '60' and data_balance > '0' ) as count_dep_60
, (select nvl(sum(data_balance),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '61' and data_balance > '0' ) as sum_dep_61
, (select nvl(count(data_refno),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '61' and data_balance > '0' ) as count_dep_61
, (select nvl(sum(data_balance),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '62' and data_balance > '0' ) as sum_dep_62
, (select nvl(count(data_refno),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '62' and data_balance > '0' ) as count_dep_62
from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_cls_confirm_letter where sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_cls_confirm_mem.mem_type in ('01','02') and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' and sc_cls_confirm_letter.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_letter.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no not between '035700' and '035799' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '31/07/2023' --and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = '040900' order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no )tab
